task.title: Add Tests for User Model
task.description: Create unit tests for the User model. Test files should go in tests/unit/ directory.
constraints: Only create/modify files in tests/unit/ directory
Do not modify files in other test directories
Keep test files organized in tests/unit/
success_criteria: Tests cover key User model methods

arguments.content:
import unittest
from src.models.user import User

# Test data constants within the test file
TEST_USERNAME = 'testuser'
TEST_EMAIL = 'test@example.com'
TEST_PASSWORD = 'secret123'

class TestUserModel(unittest.TestCase):
    
    def setUp(self):
        """Set up test user instance before each test."""
        self.user = User(
            username=TEST_USERNAME,
            email=TEST_EMAIL
        )
    
    def test_set_password(self):
        """Test that set_password creates a hash."""
        self.user.set_password(TEST_PASSWORD)
        self.assertIsNotNone(self.user.password_hash)
        self.assertNotEqual(self.user.password_hash, TEST_PASSWORD)
    
    def test_check_password_correct(self):
        """Test password verification with correct password."""
        self.user.set_password(TEST_PASSWORD)
        self.assertTrue(self.user.check_password(TEST_PASSWORD))
    
    def test_check_password_incorrect(self):
        """Test password verification with incorrect password."""
        self.user.set_password(TEST_PASSWORD)
        self.assertFalse(self.user.check_password('wrongpass'))
    
    def test_user_creation(self):
        """Test user instance creation with required fields."""
        self.assertEqual(self.user.username, TEST_USERNAME)
        self.assertEqual(self.user.email, TEST_EMAIL)
        self.assertTrue(self.user.is_active)  # Default value
    
    def test_deactivate(self):
        """Test user deactivation method."""
        self.user.is_active = True
        self.user.deactivate()
        self.assertFalse(self.user.is_active)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
